name: basic-10-turns
description: 10 turns of mixed chat, followed by a /skill:docs lookup. Asserts the router still routes a read-only docs lookup to the cheap tier.

skill.name: docs
skill.instructions: Read-only documentation lookup skill. Use codebase-retrieval to find the requested symbol and explain it.

messages.content: Hey, I'm onboarding to this repo.
Welcome! Where would you like to start?
I'm trying to understand the auth flow.
The auth flow lives in src/auth/.
What does the token verifier do?
It validates JWTs and checks expiry.
Watch for clock skew on the expiry check.

actorOutputs.userGoal: Explain the TokenVerifier class in the auth module.
actorOutputs.knownContext: Repo has an auth module under src/auth/ that validates JWTs and is sensitive to clock skew.

executionRoute.reason: Read-only lookup of a documented symbol.
